Beginning at the southeast corner of the herein described tract; thence N 30°00'00" W, 220.00 feet; thence along a curve to the left having a radius of 300.00 feet, an arc length of 80.00 feet, and a chord bearing N 37°38'00" W, 79.80 feet; thence N 45°15'00" W, 150.00 feet; thence along a curve to the right having a radius of 200.00 feet, an arc length of 60.00 feet, and a chord bearing N 36°39'00" W, 59.75 feet; thence S 60°00'00" E, 420.00 feet to the point of beginning.
